title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people having breakfast at home. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A mother and two children are having breakfast in a kitchen. One child is eating cereal and the other is drinking orange juice. There is bread, fruit and milk on the table.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people visiting a zoo. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A father and his daughter are looking at giraffes at a zoo. The girl is pointing at one of the animals while the father is smiling. There is a fence, trees and an information board near them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
